identity.name: extract-intent
identity.description: Extract 3-7 easy-to-read Russian intent steps from one JSON or JSONL session file

flags.name: --input
flags.description: Path to one JSON or JSONL session file

flags.name: --project
flags.description: Project folder; resolve the latest matching session file before extraction

flags.name: --provider
flags.description: Single source harness provider alias, used with --project

flags.name: --providers-config
flags.description: Override provider catalog JSON path for --project

flags.name: --processing-provider
flags.description: Single AI provider used for semantic summary, e.g. gemini or pi

flags.name: --max-steps
flags.description: How many intent steps to keep, 3-7

flags.name: --state-file
flags.description: Override nx-cognize provider state cache path

flags.name: --pretty
flags.description: Render a human-friendly terminal view instead of JSON

flags.name: --output
flags.description: Output path for JSON or pretty text

exit_codes.2: Invalid arguments or missing input file
exit_codes.4: Contract violation or invalid nested JSON
